parameters.content:
## GSC query/keyword -> fact_seo_query_daily (PAGINATED)

Self-serve SEO keyword feed (added 2026-06-17). Fills the 'Top keywords per category' panel that was previously unsourced (we only had page-level data).

PROPERTY: URL-prefix  https://cwsisecurity.com/  (same as search_console_ingest).
GSC retains ~16 months. Dimension = [date, query]; NO region dim (query+country gets sparse + GSC anonymises low-volume queries).

DAILY: lookback_days = 7.
ONE-TIME BACKFILL: set lookback_days = 490, run once, confirm rows, then RESET to 7.

AFTER IMPORT:
1. 'Config' gsc_site_url already = https://cwsisecurity.com/ .
2. Select the Google OAuth2 cred (webmasters.readonly) on the GSC HTTP node.
3. GSC lags ~2 days; window ends today-2.
4. NOTE: GSC withholds (anonymises) queries below a volume threshold, so summed query clicks will be < total clicks in fact_seo_daily. This is expected, not a bug.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_seo_query_daily
  (activity_date, query, clicks, impressions, ctr, avg_position, source)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_fact_seo_query_grain DO UPDATE SET
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  ctr = EXCLUDED.ctr,
  avg_position = EXCLUDED.avg_position,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('gsc_query', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, $3, $4);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $("Build Query Rows").first().json._meta.rows_in }},{{ $("Build Query Rows").all().length }},{{ $("Build Query Rows").first().json._meta.issues }},{{ (function(){ const ri = $("Build Query Rows").first().json._meta.rows_in; const is = $("Build Query Rows").first().json._meta.issues; return ri ? Number((is / ri * 100).toFixed(2)) : 0; })() }}
